title: Core: openmls MLS client module
description: Add core/src/mls.rs implementing the broadcast-group MLS state machine using openmls. Includes: key package generation, group creation (admin), join-from-Welcome, add-member (with commit+welcome output), remove-member, encrypt application message, decrypt/process incoming message. Ed25519 ciphersuite. Ephemeral group state for Phase 1 (in-memory, recreated each session).
